com.atlassian.jira.issue.customfields.impl
Class WatcherFieldType

java.lang.Object
  com.atlassian.jira.issue.customfields.impl.AbstractCustomFieldType
      com.atlassian.jira.issue.customfields.impl.AbstractSingleFieldType
          com.atlassian.jira.issue.customfields.impl.StringCFType
              com.atlassian.jira.issue.customfields.impl.TextCFType
                  com.atlassian.jira.issue.customfields.impl.AbstractMultiCFType
                      com.atlassian.jira.issue.customfields.impl.MultiUserCFType
                          com.atlassian.jira.issue.customfields.impl.WatcherFieldType
All Implemented Interfaces:
CustomFieldType, ProjectImportableCustomField, SortableCustomField, UserCFNotificationTypeAware
public class WatcherFieldType
extends MultiUserCFType

This class is a custom field type that allows users with "Manage Watcher List" permissions to modify users when creating/updating issues.

Author:
Ray Barham
See Also:
MultiUserCFType

Method Summary
protected  void addWatchers(Issue issue, List userList)
          Add a list of users as watchers on an issue.

          Overridden, adds a list of watchers to an issue.

          Overridden, returns the value reported in the changelog

          Overridden, returns the a list of watchers on the passed issue

          Overridden, updates an issue with a list of watchers.

          Overridden, returns true if the current watcher list is equal to the new ones provided.

Constructor Detail

WatcherFieldType

public WatcherFieldType(CustomFieldValuePersister customFieldValuePersister,
                        StringConverter stringConverter,
                        GenericConfigManager genericConfigManager,
                        MultiUserConverter multiUserConverter,
                        ApplicationProperties applicationProperties,
                        JiraAuthenticationContext authenticationContext,
                        UserPickerSearchService searchService)
Overridden, calls super constructor.

See Also:
MultiUserCFType
Method Detail

addWatchers

protected void addWatchers(Issue issue,
                           List userList)
Add a list of users as watchers on an issue.

Parameters:
issue - The issue to add watchers to.
userList - A list of User objects to add as watchers.

createValue

public void createValue(CustomField customField,
                        Issue issue,
                        Object value)
Overridden, adds a list of watchers to an issue.

Parameters:
customField - See AbstractMultiCFType.createValue.
issue - See AbstractMultiCFType.createValue.
value - List of User objects to add as watchers.
See Also:
AbstractMultiCFType.createValue(CustomField, Issue, Object)

isIssueEditable

protected boolean isIssueEditable(Issue issue)
Checks to see if the issue can be edited. It checks to see if the issue has been create, if it is editable, and if the authenticated user has permissions.

Parameters:
issue - The issue being edited.
Returns:
True if able to edit, false otherwise.

isJiraAdmin

public boolean isJiraAdmin(com.opensymphony.user.User user)
Checks if a user is a JIRA administrator.

Parameters:
user - The user the check
Returns:
True if has permissions, false otherwise.

isUserPermitted

public boolean isUserPermitted(Issue issue)
Checks if a user the authenticated user has the "Manage Watcher List" permission.

Parameters:
issue - The issue the user is trying to add watchers to.
Returns:
True if has permissions, false otherwise.

getChangelogValue

public String getChangelogValue(CustomField field,
                                Object value)
Overridden, returns the value reported in the changelog

Returns:
The full names of watching users in a comma separated list.
See Also:
AbstractMultiCFType.getChangelogValue(CustomField, Object)

getValueFromIssue

public Object getValueFromIssue(CustomField field,
                                Issue issue)
Overridden, returns the a list of watchers on the passed issue

Returns:
List of User objects that are watchers on the passed issue.
See Also:
AbstractMultiCFType.getValueFromIssue(CustomField, Issue)

getVelocityParameters

public Map getVelocityParameters(Issue issue,
                                 CustomField field,
                                 FieldLayoutItem fieldLayoutItem)
Overridden, adds the "hasPermissions" parameter to velocity with true if the authenticated user has "Manage Watcher List" permissions, false otherwise.

See Also:
AbstractCustomFieldType.getVelocityParameters(Issue, CustomField, FieldLayoutItem)

getWatchers

protected List getWatchers(Issue issue)
Get a list of of watchers on an issue.

Parameters:
issue - The issue to get watchers from.
Returns:
A List of User objects that are watchers on the passed issue.

removeWatchers

protected void removeWatchers(Issue issue,
                              List userList)
Remove a list of users as watchers on an issue.

Parameters:
issue - The issue to add watchers to.
userList - A list of User objects to remove from being watchers.

updateValue

public void updateValue(CustomField customField,
                        Issue issue,
                        Object value)
Overridden, updates an issue with a list of watchers.

Parameters:
customField - See AbstractMultiCFType.createValue.
issue - See AbstractMultiCFType.createValue.
value - List of User objects to update as watchers. Note, any user not in this list that was previously a watcher will be removed.
See Also:
AbstractMultiCFType.updateValue(CustomField, Issue, Object)

valuesEqual

public boolean valuesEqual(Object v1,
                           Object v2)
Overridden, returns true if the current watcher list is equal to the new ones provided.

See Also:
AbstractCustomFieldType.valuesEqual(Object, Object)
